meta.tagline: Your factory automation solution. Engineered in Selangor.

home.heroWhatsappMsg: Hi Auraplex, I saw your site and want to talk.
home.heroH1: Engineered in Malaysia. Built to outlast the line.
home.heroSub: Self-adhesive labelling machines, packaging machinery and custom automation for ASEAN manufacturers. Designed, built, installed and serviced from our floor in Seri Kembangan.

items.title: Built here.
items.body: Local manufacturing, local engineers, local support. 4-week delivery instead of months from China.

items.title: End-to-end automation.
items.body: Labelling, packaging, 3D printing, MES & SCADA — engineered as one solution, not bolted-on pieces.

items.title: Custom by default.
items.body: Every floor is different. We engineer to your container, your throughput, your existing line.

machineFinderCta.title: Not sure which machine?
machineFinderCta.body: Describe your product and your line. We'll recommend the right machine, configuration, and lead time.

items.a: Standard machines ship in 4 weeks from order confirmation. Custom builds are typically 8–12 weeks.
Yes. Every machine includes on-site installation, line integration, and operator training across Peninsular Malaysia, Sabah, and Sarawak.
Two years parts and labour, with optional extended-coverage plans up to five years.

Yes — every machine can be tailored to your container shape, throughput target, label material, and existing line topology. Bring a sample to our Seri Kembangan floor — we'll engineer to your reality.
Yes — we ship across ASEAN with full CE, SIRIM, and origin documentation.

items.q: What containers do your labellers support?
items.a: Round, oval, square, conical, and custom shapes from 30mm to 250mm diameter. Wrap-around, front-and-back, top, and bottom labelling supported.

carousel.hint: Hover to pause · click any machine to open it

manifesto.title: Precision is not a feature.
manifesto.body: It is the foundation of every machine that leaves our floor. Built here. Serviced here. Engineered to outlast the line.

featured.h2: Hand-built in Selangor. Photographed on the floor.
featured.body: Every machine in the catalogue is engineered here in Malaysia, tested on real production lines, and supported by a local team in the language your floor speaks.

zoomA.body: Mechanical, electrical, controls, installation — all under one roof in Seri Kembangan. No re-badge, no outsourced engineering.

zoomB.body: 0.2% reject rate. Down from 1.4%. Same line. Different machine.

detail.specsFallback: Full specifications for this machine — throughput curves, container compatibility, dimensions, power and air requirements — are available on request. Download the spec sheet above or talk to an engineer for a tailored breakdown.
detail.specSheetBody: We'll email the full PDF — dimensions, throughput curves, container chart, installation requirements.

forms.name: Name
forms.thanks: Thanks — we'll be in touch within one business day.
forms.machineFinderWelcome: Tell me about what you make and how fast your line runs. I'll match you to the right machine.
forms.machineFinderError: — I lost the connection mid-thought. Try again, or WhatsApp us if it persists.

internship.thanks: Application received — we review every CV within 5 business days and reply either way.

internship.startDateHelper: e.g. January 2027, or "as soon as possible"

footer.rights: © 2026 Auraplex SDN BHD. All rights reserved.
footer.address: Auraplex SDN BHD · No 5, Jalan BS9/7B, Taman Bukit Serdang, Seksyen 9, 43300 Seri Kembangan, Selangor, Malaysia

common.whatsappDefaultMsg: Hi Auraplex, I'd like to learn more about your machines.

page2026.lede: We shipped 30 machines, photographed 142 of them on the floor in Selangor, and put precision applicators into 11 industries across ASEAN — from cosmetics in Klang to pharma in Penang. Here's the year, in the order it happened.

wordCloud.h2: The words that came back to us most.

team.body: Six engineering disciplines on one floor. Every machine that leaves the building has been touched by all of them.

items.note: Drop-in upgrade path for the original v1.

founder.lead: When we started Auraplex, we made one decision that's shaped every machine since: build it here.
founder.leadSub: No re-badging from Wenzhou. No outsourced controls. No 14-week ocean freight on a part you needed yesterday.
founder.p1: 2026 was the year that decision started paying buyers back. A cosmetics manufacturer in Klang called us at 9pm on a Saturday — a labeller had jammed mid-run. An engineer was on-site by 8am Sunday with the right part in a Toyota Hilux. That doesn't happen with an import.
founder.p2: We added a vision-checking system to the Custom Top Labelling line, which let a pharma customer drop their reject rate from 1.4% to under 0.2%. The Continuous Band Sealer got a v2 with a wider tolerance window — the kind of small fix that only happens when the R&D team eats lunch with the service team.
founder.p3: In 2027 we're leaning further into custom rigs. Two pilot customers have asked for full-line integration — a single rig that fills, caps, labels and seals from one HMI. Those builds happen on our floor in Seri Kembangan, with engineers your plant manager can call by name.
founder.ctaWhatsappMsg: Saw the 2026 year-in-review — want to talk machines.

catalogue.summary: {total} machines · {photo} photographed on the floor · 3 categories

closer.body: Tours run weekly. Coffee's on us. Bring a sample container — we'll run it on the closest applicator while you watch.

trustedBy.footnote: + dozens of ASEAN manufacturers across food, beverage, FMCG and industrial labelling.

about.p1: Auraplex is an engineering company in Seri Kembangan, Selangor. We design, build, install and support self-adhesive labelling machines, packaging machinery, 3D printers and custom automation for manufacturers across ASEAN — under one roof, with one team.
about.p2: The model is simple. Manufacturers don't need cheaper machines — they need machines that don't strand them when a sensor fails on a Tuesday night. We staff full-time engineers locally. Parts ship from a warehouse you can drive to. Service calls get an engineer on the floor, not a ticket number.
about.p3: The catalogue covers labelling machines, packaging machinery, 3D printers, MES & SCADA solutions, and bespoke automation rigs. What ties them together isn't a product family — it's that they're engineered by people who'll be on your floor on installation day, and on a WhatsApp call when something needs servicing.

tour.body: The fastest way to understand an Auraplex machine is to watch one being built. Walk the floor with our chief engineer. Bring a sample container — we'll run it on the closest applicator while you watch.
tour.address: Auraplex SDN BHD · No 5, Jalan BS9/7B, Taman Bukit Serdang, Seksyen 9, 43300 Seri Kembangan, Selangor, Malaysia
tour.whatsappMsg: Hi — I'd like to book a factory tour.

services.subtitle: Every Auraplex install includes commissioning, operator handover, and a local service engineer on call. Four disciplines, all under one roof in Seri Kembangan.

items.name: Installation & Commissioning
items.summary: On-site setup, line integration and runtime tuning. Performed by the engineers who built the machine.

items.name: Maintenance & Repair
items.summary: Local parts pipeline + service engineers across Peninsular Malaysia, Sabah, and Sarawak.

items.name: Training
items.summary: Operator + line-supervisor training on your floor or at our facility in Seri Kembangan.
deliverables: Documentation in EN / BM / Mandarin on request

items.name: Custom Automation
items.summary: Bespoke rigs engineered for non-standard containers, throughputs, or line topologies.

process.body: Every Auraplex machine — standard or custom — moves through the same seven-step process. Fixed lead time, fixed price at quote, no surprise change-orders mid-build.

steps.name: Discovery
steps.summary: Bring a sample container, share your line topology and target throughput. We walk your floor (or you ours) and confirm scope in writing.

steps.name: Quote
steps.summary: Fixed-price quote within one business day for standard machines, three days for custom. Lead time locked in writing — typically 4 weeks standard, 8–12 weeks custom.

steps.name: Engineering
steps.summary: CAD review, bill-of-materials lock, electrical schematic sign-off. You see the build drawings before steel is cut.

steps.name: Build
steps.summary: Assembled on our floor in Seri Kembangan. Same engineers who designed it are the ones turning the wrenches. FAT (Factory Acceptance Test) photographed and shared with your team.

steps.name: Install
steps.summary: Commissioned on your line by our engineers. We handle line integration, sensor wiring, HMI configuration, and recipe setup.

steps.name: Train
steps.summary: Operator + line-supervisor handover. Runbook in EN / BM / Mandarin. Your team is signing off changeovers before we leave.

steps.name: Support
steps.summary: Two-year parts and labour warranty. Local service engineers reachable by phone. Parts shipped overnight across Peninsular Malaysia.

cta.body: We service third-party labellers too. Send us the model and photographs of the issue — we'll quote within one business day.
cta.whatsappMsg: Hi — I need service on a machine. Can I send photos?

careers.subtitle: Auraplex employs engineers, technicians, installers and service specialists across six disciplines in Seri Kembangan. We hire when the work demands it — small team, real ownership.

internships.body: We host 6 – 8 undergraduate interns per year. You'll work on machines currently being built — not training rigs, not sandbox projects. Open to Malaysian universities and ASEAN exchange students.

items.work: Frame design, fixture jigs, CAD review, assembly support on the floor.
PLC programming, sensor integration, panel build, electrical testing.
HMI development, recipe management, line-integration software, vision-system tuning.

internshipLink.body: We have a dedicated landing page for internship applications — fewer fields than the careers form, FAQ tailored to students, and the application routes to the same recruiting inbox.

items.a: Yes. Every internship has a monthly RM stipend, confirmed in writing at offer. Stipend scales with discipline and seniority of the work.
3 to 6 months by default, with the option to extend if you're still in semester. Strong performers often convert to part-time during finals + full-time on graduation.
We onboard year-round. Pick a date that fits your semester. We try to start two new interns per month so you'll usually have at least one other intern in your cohort.
On-site at our Seri Kembangan floor. Engineering work means touching real machines — you'll be in safety boots, holding calipers, debugging on the HMI.
Strong performers get a full-time offer. We make the offer before you leave the building, not weeks later. For those who don't convert, we write detailed references.

items.q: Do I need to be Malaysian?
items.a: Not necessarily. We recruit Malaysian residents and citizens by default; international applicants with a valid student pass should reach out — we'll discuss case by case.

apply.h2Line2: We reply within five business days.
apply.body: We review every CV. The form below captures everything our recruiting team needs to triage your application without a back-and-forth — pick the discipline that fits you best, tell us when you can start, and link to your CV.
apply.bullet1: Paid internship — RM stipend confirmed at offer
apply.bullet2: 3–6 months, extendable to a full-time offer
apply.bullet3: Seri Kembangan, Selangor — on-floor with the engineers

cv.body: Not an internship application? Email your CV with a short note about which discipline interests you most. We keep a rolling shortlist — when we're ready to hire, the shortlist is where we start.

internship.lede: Paid internships across six disciplines — mechanical, electrical, controls, software, industrial design, and service. Three to six months on the floor in Seri Kembangan, with the engineers who designed the machines you'll touch.

paid.title: Paid, confirmed at offer.
paid.body: Monthly RM stipend, scaled with discipline. Stipend amount is in writing on your offer letter — no "we'll discuss it later."

duration.title: 3–6 months.
duration.body: Default 3 months, extendable to 6 if your semester aligns. Strong performers often go from intern → part-time during finals → full-time on graduation.

floor.title: On the floor, not in a corner.
floor.body: Safety boots, calipers, HMI debugging. You sit next to the engineer who designed the machine you're working on — not in a separate "interns desk" away from the real work.

careersLink.body: Graduates and experienced engineers — head to /careers. Internships are this page; full-time is over there.

news.subtitle: Exhibitions, awards, partnerships, new machine releases. Updates from Auraplex go here — quarterly, honest, no marketing fluff.

empty.body: We'd rather wait until we have news worth telling. In the meantime — talk to the engineers who'll be in the first issue.

article.body: Auraplex news lands quarterly. Head back to the index for the latest, or talk to us directly.

contact.subtitle: We respond within one business day. For urgent matters, WhatsApp is fastest.

people.h2: Three direct lines. No phone tree.
people.body: The same people who answer on auraplex.com.my answer here — message any of them directly on WhatsApp.

response.body: within 1 business day by email · within the hour on WhatsApp during business hours.

caseStudies.subtitle: Auraplex field reports are long-form, photographed on-site, and published quarterly. We'd rather ship one honest story than twelve press releases.

items.title: On the floor
items.body: Every report is photographed in the customer's plant — not in our showroom.

items.title: With numbers
items.body: Throughput before / after. Reject rate before / after. Payback in months, not narrative.

items.title: And the snags
items.body: What the install missed, what the second iteration fixed, what we learned for the next build.

cta.h2: Want the first issue when it lands?
cta.body: Or skip the wait — talk to the engineers who'll be in the report. We'll walk you through what works on real floors.

detail.body: Auraplex field reports are produced quarterly, on-site, with real throughput numbers. The first issue is in editorial. Sign up to get it when it lands — or skip the wait and talk to the team directly.

machineFinder.h1: Describe your line. We'll match the machine.
machineFinder.subtitle: Talk to our AI application engineer. Trained on the Auraplex catalogue and 340+ deployed installations. Every recommendation is reviewed by a human engineer within 24 hours.
